purpose: Machine-readable catalog of existing WellFit agents/frameworks, ownership areas, registers, docs, validators, extension boundaries, protected boundaries, and next safe maintenance tasks. This catalog prevents duplicate architecture and helps future agents decide whether to extend an existing agent domain or propose a new agent first.

entries.name: Autopilot Dry Run
entries.purpose: Dry-run-only next-task orchestration that reads existing governance and reports safe task selection without writing files.
allowedExtensionTypes: source-of-truth and Work Map/TODO Index pointers
handoff/report output clarifications within the same domain
requiresNewAgentProposalFor: new durable agent role or owner outside this domain
new runtime authority or product behavior
protected/high-risk scope ownership
overlap across two or more existing agents without one clear owner
protectedBoundaries: No runtime product code changes without a scoped approved task.

No token, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, reward-authority, mission-completion-authority, health, child, location, privacy, legal, compliance, Unity/PR #13, approval, merge, repair, or deploy authority.
Report-only governance by default; human review required for protected or high/critical scope.

entries.purpose: Report-only governance agent that selects exactly one next approved future agent from the approved build backlog and generates a safe human-reviewed Codex build prompt without automatically creating agents.
allowedExtensionTypes: add Work Map/TODO Index references for proposal outputs
requiresNewAgentProposalFor: building a future agent automatically
selecting more than one future agent per prompt
granting runtime/product/code modification authority
approval, merge, repair, deploy, auto-merge, or auto-repair authority
protectedBoundaries: No runtime product code changes without a scoped approved task.

No token, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, reward-authority, mission-completion-authority, health, child, location, privacy, legal, compliance, Unity/PR #13, approval, merge, repair, or deploy authority.
Report-only governance by default; human review required for every generated proposal and prompt.
entries.nextSafeMaintenanceTask: Review generated next-agent build prompt, then execute exactly one approved agent build only after human acceptance.

entries.name: Human Motivation Engine
entries.purpose: Report-only framework defining healthy habit loops, motivation dimensions, Buddy support boundaries, adaptive difficulty inputs, recovery rules, and forbidden addictive engagement patterns before runtime personalization or product logic exists.
allowedExtensionTypes: human-review checklist additions for protected motivation boundaries
requiresNewAgentProposalFor: runtime personalization or adaptive product behavior
mission factory execution authority
reward or mission completion authority
protected child, health, location, camera, biometric, consent, privacy, token, wallet, payment, betting, or monetization behavior
new Ethical Engagement Guard or Product Intelligence owner domains
protectedBoundaries: No runtime product code changes, runtime personalization, protected-data processing, reward authority, mission-completion authority, token/NFT/wallet/payment/betting behavior, Unity/PR #13 work, approval, merge, repair, or deploy authority.
Child, health, location, camera, biometric, consent, privacy, monetization, reward-authority, and mission-authority behavior remains review_required.

Forbidden engagement patterns include addictive design, manipulative FOMO, shame/guilt pressure, sleep-deprivation pressure, child-targeted monetization, gambling-like rewards, lootbox money-near mechanics, hidden sponsor pressure, dark-pattern notifications, social humiliation, paywall mission chains, and medical/weight-loss overclaims.
entries.nextSafeMaintenanceTask: Keep the Human Motivation Engine register, architecture doc, validator, Work Map, TODO Index, and quality-gate integration synchronized; next recommended task is Ethical Engagement Guard.

entries.name: Ethical Engagement Guard
entries.purpose: Report-only framework for checking WellFit missions, rewards, AI Buddy messaging, retention mechanics, website claims, learning loops, social features, sponsor ideas, and monetization proposals against healthy, age-appropriate, recovery-aware, consent-preserving, and non-manipulative engagement rules before runtime implementation.
entries.ownerArea: Human Motivation / Ethical Engagement / Trust and Safety
allowedExtensionTypes: human-review checklist additions for protected engagement boundaries
requiresNewAgentProposalFor: runtime personalization or adaptive product behavior
mission factory execution authority
reward or mission completion authority
protected child/minor, health, location, camera, face, biometric, motion, consent, privacy, token, wallet, payment, betting, sponsor, monetization, or legal/compliance behavior
new Product Intelligence or runtime ethical-scoring owner domains
protectedBoundaries: No runtime product code changes, runtime personalization, runtime tracking/profiling, protected-data processing, reward authority, mission-completion authority, token/NFT/wallet/payment/betting behavior, Unity/PR #13 work, approval, merge, repair, or deploy authority.

Health, child/minor, family/guardian, location, camera, face, biometric, motion, consent, privacy, token, wallet, payment, reward-authority, mission-authority, sponsor, monetization, legal, and compliance behavior remains review_required.

Forbidden engagement patterns include manipulative FOMO, shame/guilt pressure, sleep-deprivation pressure, social humiliation, gambling-like rewards, lootbox money-near mechanics, age-inappropriate monetization, child-targeted purchase pressure, hidden sponsor pressure, dark-pattern notifications, paywall mission chains, endless pressure loops, punishment for rest, medical/weight-loss overclaims, token/payout hype, and betting/wager language.
entries.nextSafeMaintenanceTask: Keep the Ethical Engagement Guard register, architecture doc, validator, Work Map, TODO Index, and quality-gate integration synchronized; next recommended task is Adaptive Difficulty Agent according to the approved backlog order.

entries.name: Adaptive Difficulty Agent
entries.purpose: Report-only framework for safe mission difficulty, mission length, Buddy tone, learning format, activity intensity, recovery mode, and social/solo mode suggestions using aggregate-safe, consent-aware, review-required signals without runtime personalization or reward/mission authority.
requiresNewAgentProposalFor: runtime personalization or difficulty tuning
protected-data profiling or new sensitive data collection
reward authority, mission-completion authority, anti-cheat authority, token/wallet/payment/betting behavior
child/minor, health, location, camera, biometric, consent, privacy, legal, or compliance behavior changes
protectedBoundaries: No runtime product code changes, mission tuning, Buddy copy changes, or UI changes.

No token, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, reward-authority, mission-completion-authority, health, child/minor, location, camera, biometric, consent, privacy, legal, Unity/PR #13, approval, merge, repair, or deploy authority.
Report-only governance by default; human review required for protected, age-sensitive, runtime, or high/critical scope.
entries.nextSafeMaintenanceTask: Build the Multisensory Learning Engine next as report-only planning/validation, inheriting Adaptive Difficulty, Human Motivation, and Ethical Engagement boundaries.
